---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Office hours on instructor page!
  - Mine will be after class on Wednesday's!
  - Note on Office hours: please come and just drop in! 
    - Come for a minute or the whole time! 
- Reminder: I am teaching a data science course next year (spring)
  - It'll be a pilot course and be under BSTA 504

### Events in SPH

![](../images_key_info/key_info2.png)

## Key Dates

- HW 1 due 4/19
- Quiz 1 opens 4/22
